10.evidenceText: No price information found in the provided content from either source.
10.extractionRationale: Both sources provided contain product information and features for the Schwalbe Clik Valve, but neither source excerpt includes any retail pricing information in EUR or any other currency.

27.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve kaufen - Top Auswahl | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Distinct product pages identified: (1) p1960182.html - Schlauch No. 19 with Clik Valve, (2) p1859949.html - Tubeless-Ventil 60mm, (3) p1859950.html - Tubeless-Ventil 80mm, (4) p1859948.html - Tubeless-Ventil 40mm. Category page and duplicate/accessory listings excluded.
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs with distinct product SKUs. Source 1 is a category filter page (not a product listing). Sources 2-5 each have unique product URLs (p1960182, p1859949, p1859950, p1859948) representing 4 distinct Clik Valve products: 1 tube variant and 3 tubeless valve variants in different lengths. Pump head adapters mentioned in Source 1 are excluded as accessories.

30.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve - Tubeless Valve - Set of 2 - 60 mm | BIKE24
30.evidenceText: No stock status information found in any of the 5 sources. Product descriptions only contain feature information, no availability indicators present.
30.extractionRationale: The provided sources do not contain explicit stock status information. No mentions of "out of stock", "nicht verfügbar", "ausverkauft", or similar terms appear in the content. Stock availability cannot be determined from the text provided.

61.evidenceText: The open price for Aluminium futures today is 3,552.23.
61.extractionRationale: Extracted the aluminum price figure (3,552.23) directly from the source. The evidence states this is the "open price for Aluminium futures today" but does not explicitly confirm this is the LME spot price or specify the unit (USD/ton vs USD/lb). The value appears to be in USD per metric ton based on typical LME aluminum pricing conventions, but this is not explicitly stated in the provided evidence.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest (LUPc1) - Investing.com
62.evidenceText: The Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest price today is 1,793.99
62.extractionRationale: The source shows 1,793.99 for US Midwest aluminum premium. Commodity data on Investing.com typically displays aluminum premiums in cents per pound. Converting 1,793.99 cents/lb to USD/lb: 1,793.99 ÷ 100 = 17.94 USD/lb
